description_long: This is a compact, futuristic shotgun with a predominantly black and white color scheme, featuring a robust and angular design. The main body is constructed from a matte black material with white and gray accents, giving it a high-tech, tactical appearance. The grip is ergonomic, with a pronounced trigger guard and a secondary vertical foregrip for enhanced control. The barrel is short and thick, suggesting a design optimized for close-quarters use, and the muzzle is reinforced with metallic elements. Visible mechanical details include a magazine or loading port beneath the main body and subtle panel lines indicating modular construction. The overall build appears solid and durable, suitable for urban environments where maneuverability and reliability are essential.
description: A compact, high-tech shotgun with a black and white finish, ergonomic grips, and a reinforced short barrel. Its angular, robust design suggests tactical use in urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the ergonomic grip, trigger guard, and secondary foregrip, with clear black and white color separation.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the short, reinforced barrel and the alignment of the grips, with the muzzle and foregrip most prominent.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with additional detail on the loading port and mechanical components.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the compactness of the shotgun, with the stock area and rear sight visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and reinforced with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated and angular, fully enclosing the trigger with a reinforced, squared-off shape
